evals.prompt: Create a draw.io flowchart for a user registration process: user enters email, validate format, check if email exists in DB, if yes show error, if no send verification email, user clicks link, account activated.
evals.expected_output: A .drawio file with a top-to-bottom flowchart using rectangles, diamonds, and terminators with proper edge routing.

evals.prompt: Generate a draw.io C4 container diagram for a microservice system with: API Gateway, Auth Service, User Service, Order Service, Payment Service, Notification Service, PostgreSQL (shared by User and Order), and Redis (used by Auth and API Gateway).
evals.expected_output: A .drawio file with a C4-styled container diagram showing all services, databases, and connections with proper C4 colors.

evals.prompt: Make a draw.io swimlane diagram showing a CI/CD pipeline across 3 lanes: Developer (write code, create PR), CI System (run tests, build, lint), and Ops (deploy staging, approve, deploy production).
evals.expected_output: A .drawio file with 3 horizontal swimlanes containing process steps and cross-lane arrows.
